title: Alejandro
html:
Stub. Mom's friend / family-adjacent figure who works at Dutch Bros and is approaching retirement. First explicitly named in 2024 07 04 questions mega notebook as someone Yahir is preparing interview-style questions for.

What we know

  • Works at Dutch Bros — has a son named Nathan.
  • Yahir's prepared questions: about his retirement plan, succession at his Dutch Bros team, college advice he'd give Nathan, the role of human-vs-dispensable elements in work.
  • The Dutch-Bros context may explain the Dutch-Bros-like-company in Yahir's 2022 dream.
